plan.title: Rule porting tool (crackdown migrate) + expanded compat coverage

narratives.Overview: Lower the migration barrier from markdownlint. Adds `crackdown migrate <config>` CLI command that reads an existing .markdownlintrc and reports which rules have marky equivalents, which are unsupported, and what manual steps remain. Also expands @crackdown/compat-markdownlint with 4+ additional rule shims.

items.title: `crackdown migrate <config-path>` command: reads .markdownlintrc/.markdownlint.json, outputs a migration report (supported, unsupported, manual-review)
Migration report includes a generated crackdown.config.ts snippet with all supported rules pre-wired
MD009 (trailing-spaces) rule shim added (read-only; fix provided by auto-fix scope)
Rule mapping table in README.md updated to reflect new coverage
Tests: migrate command produces correct report; new rules fire on appropriate violations; task check green
